creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 183404
Patch to update sysutils/garcon

- Update to 0.6.1
- Add GTK2 option (it is required by xfce4-whiskermenu-plugin and xfce4-panel)
- Sort USES
- Adjust dependencies (reported by QA script)
- Regenerate configure patch (with 'make makepatch')

Note: Mk/Scripts/smart_makepatch.sh seems bogus, it can't apply cleanly garcon-gtk/Makefile.in, that's why it's copied in 'post-extract' target.
